roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S NON OPPO TO MTN TO SET ASIDE PLEA AND CONV FILED
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATING CONVICTION FILED
CHANGE OF PLEA TX FILED (COPIES PD/DA IN DEPT M09)

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/DAWT//X: THIS MATTER IS NOT REPORTED/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF SEPTEMBER 27TH, 2018/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:08-07-2013/X: SENTENCE DATE:09-27-2013/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA,/CTORD:THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WAS ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 08-07-2013 ISSET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 09-27-2018ARE HEREBY VACATED,/X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERSTHE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE/X:FELONY PLEA TRANSCRIPT FILED,/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/AJW/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 TO3 YEARS, THE LOW TERM/STATES/X:TOTAL 3 YEARS/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ 1 Y/4019HALF/CTS:5/MANSUPCTS:10/MANSUP:BALANCE/MANSUP1/SHER/11590/RX/DTC/WS/WEAP/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:300/LF 18/PF500 18/DPFEE 18/COLLECT/FORF5:$28,130,00/BE/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:09-27-18/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOP/
/CAL:I&A, P/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:I&A, P&C/X:DEFENSE ATTORNEY NAOMI CHUNG APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT/BWDNC/TWA/CONT/DOP/
/OR/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
